description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy job that runs on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9.
